dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.arenaDescription: Discover upcoming events and register your teams to compete for glory.

sports.browseDescription: Browse and register for the upcoming prestige events.
sports.noEventsDesc: There are no active {sport} tournaments at the moment. Check back soon or explore other categories.

football.tagline: Dominate the pitch. Claim the trophy.

tennis.tagline: Every serve counts. Every rally matters.

hero.title: The New Standard
hero.description: Elevate your competitive edge on the most advanced platform for professional athletes and elite gamers.

home.legacyDescription: Your career is more than just raw stats. Showcase your achievements with a viral, 3D collectible card that represents your legacy.
home.dominateDescription: Join thousands of players already competing in the arena. Your journey to pro starts here.

arena.title: COMPETE IN THE
arena.description: Step into the spotlight and prove your worth. Join the world's most prestigious tournaments.

features.description: Discover a suite of tools designed to take your competitive career to the next level. From viral networking to deep data analysis.

analytics.title: Detailed Analytics
analytics.description: Track every stat, from headshot percentage to win rates across multiple games with pro-level accuracy.

cards.title: Viral Player Cards
cards.description: Create and share customizable 3D player cards that showcase your career highlights and global rating.

scouting.title: Pro Scouting
scouting.description: Get noticed by top-tier organizations and scouts through our advanced talent discovery leaderboard.

hosting.title: Tournament Hosting
hosting.description: Launch your own competitive leagues with automated bracket management and built-in prize distribution.

updates.title: Real-time Updates
updates.description: Experience lag-free score tracking and live match data for physical and electronic sports tournaments.

leaderboards.title: Global Leaderboards
leaderboards.description: Climb the ranks and compete with players worldwide for the top spot in the matchpoint ecosystem.

footer.description: The premier platform for eSports and physical sports tournaments. Elevate your competitive career with pro-level analytics and networking.
footer.newsletter: Join our newsletter for tournament updates.
footer.rights: All rights reserved. Built for the next generation of athletes.

aichat.greeting: Hello! I'm your MatchPoint AI assistant. How can I help you dominate the arena today?
aichat.placeholder: Ask about tournaments, cards, or stats...
aichat.mode: I'm currently in 'UI-only' mode, but I'll be fully operational soon! Stay tuned for my advanced tournament insights.

auth.signInDesc: Your account opens on your profile page after login.
auth.signUpDesc: Register and then sign in with your new account.
